'''janugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coadministratrix|coadministratrix]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-n-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coadministratrix|coadministratrix]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| janugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jænigith|jænigith]] || [[word:jænigij|jænigij]] || [[word:jænigish|jænigish]] || [[word:jænigi|jænigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:janunuguth|janunuguth]] || [[word:janunuguj|janunuguj]] || [[word:janunugush|janunugush]] || [[word:janunugu|janunugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:januguth|januguth]] || [[word:januguj|januguj]] || [[word:janugush|janugush]] || [[word:janugu|janugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:janufguth|janufguth]] || [[word:janufguj|janufguj]] || [[word:janufgush|janufgush]] || [[word:janufguf|janufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:januguthu|januguthu]] || [[word:januguju|januguju]] || [[word:janugushu|janugushu]] || [[word:januguku|januguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:januguth|januguth]] || [[word:januguj|januguj]] || [[word:janugush|janugush]] || [[word:janugu|janugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:januguthul|januguthul]] || [[word:janugujul|janugujul]] || [[word:janugushul|janugushul]] || [[word:janugukul|janugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:januguthuthu|januguthuthu]] || [[word:janugujuju|janugujuju]] || [[word:janugushushu|janugushushu]] || [[word:januguku|januguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:januguthun|januguthun]] || [[word:janugujun|janugujun]] || [[word:janugushun|janugushun]] || [[word:janugukun|janugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:januguthuoro|januguthuoro]] || [[word:janugujuoro|janugujuoro]] || [[word:janugushuoro|janugushuoro]] || [[word:janugukuoro|janugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
